steps.script: (html) => { try { const iframe = document.querySelector('main iframe'); if (iframe && iframe.contentDocument && iframe.contentDocument.body) { iframe.contentDocument.body.innerHTML = html; iframe.contentDocument.body.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return { success: true, method: 'new_iframe', length: html.length }; } return { success: false, error: 'iframe not found' }; } catch (e) { return { success: false, error: e.message }; } }

() => { const firstTag = document.querySelector('[class*="tabs__item"][title="学习和成长"], [class*="tab-item"][title="学习和成长"]') || Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div, span')).find(el => el.textContent.trim() === '学习和成长'); if (firstTag) firstTag.click(); return !!firstTag; }

() => { const names = ['职场和发展', '学习方法']; let clicked = 0; for (const name of names) { const el = document.querySelector('[class*="tag"][title="' + name + '"], .tag-item[title="' + name + '"]') || Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('span, div, label')).find(e => e.textContent.trim() === name); if (el) { el.click(); clicked++; } } return clicked; }
